impact: This lets the daemon resume autonomous progress without spinning on malformed mutation-validator attempts: the next selected work is still narrow, fixture-only, and py_compile-first, with explicit syntax guardrails and no domain implementation.
summary: Add deterministic supervisor guidance for the repeated checkbox-27 Python syntax failures and reset the active recovery task to selectable needed state.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
